projectName: Book My Show - Ticket Booking API
projectDescription: A Spring Boot REST API for booking movie tickets, managing shows, seats, and users with transactional seat reservation and status tracking.
keyFeatures: Atomic seat reservation — all seats booked or none (all-or-nothing transaction)
Concurrent request safety for high-traffic ticket booking
Show seat status lifecycle: AVAILABLE → BLOCKED → BOOKED
H2 in-memory database for fast local development and testing
JPA-backed domain model with City, Theatre, Screen, Show, Seat, ShowSeat, and Ticket entities
Lombok-powered DTOs for clean request/response contracts
publicApiSurface: TicketService.bookTicket(List<Integer> showSeatIds, int userId) throws Exception
